name: Sensitive Registry Hive Access via Reg Utility
description: Detects the use of the 'reg.exe' utility to save or export sensitive registry hives (SAM, SYSTEM, SECURITY). This is a common technique used by attackers to gather credentials and other sensitive information.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the process that invoked reg.exe.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The path to the executable image (reg.exe).

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line arguments, including 'save' or 'export' and 'HKLM\SYSTEM', 'HKLM\SAM', or 'HKLM\SECURITY'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which 'reg.exe' was executed.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that invoked reg.exe.

parameters.name: original_file_name
parameters.description: The original file name of the executable (reg.exe).
